title: OIDC Authentication and Callback Flow
interaction_flow: OIDCRouter → OIDCService: getProviderConfig(provider) — 404 if not configured
OIDCRouter: build statePayload {provider, redirect_uri, [embedded_in_popup, msg_id, opener_origin], [flow:'revalidate', user_id]}
OIDCRouter → OIDCService: getAuthorizationUrl(provider, state, flow) → redirectUrl
OIDCRouter → OIDCService: getCallbackUrlForFlow(flow) [called internally by getAuthorizationUrl]
OIDCRouter → Browser: 302 redirect to IdP authorization URL
Browser → IdentityProvider: authorization request (client_id, redirect_uri, response_type=code, scope, state)
IdentityProvider → Browser: 302 callback with code + state
processOIDCCallbackRequest_ → OIDCService: verifyState(state) → stateDecoded (JWT verify; null if invalid/expired)
OIDCService → IdentityProvider: POST token_endpoint (code, redirect_uri, client_id, client_secret, grant_type)
processOIDCCallbackRequest_ returns {provider, userinfo, stateDecoded} or {error: Symbol}
OIDCRouter → OIDCService: findUserByProviderSub(provider, userinfo.sub) → user | null
[if no user] OIDCRouter → OIDCService: createUserFromOIDC(provider, userinfo) → outcome
OIDCService → Database: INSERT user + INSERT user_oidc_providers
AuthService: create_session_() → writes session to DB
AuthService → TokenService: sign('auth', {type:'session', uuid, user_uid}) → JWT
OIDCRouter → Browser: Set-Cookie(puter_auth, session_token) + 302 redirect to target
OIDCRouter → OIDCService: findUserByProviderSub(provider, userinfo.sub) → existingUser | null
[if existingUser] OIDCRouter → finishOidcSuccess_(..., {oidc_switched:'login'}) → 302 redirect (switched to login)
[if no user] OIDCRouter → OIDCService: createUserFromOIDC(provider, userinfo) → outcome
OIDCRouter: validate user.id === stateDecoded.user_id (403 if mismatch)
OIDCRouter → jwt.sign({user_id, purpose:'revalidate'}, jwt_secret, {expiresIn:300}) → revalidate token
OIDCRouter → Browser: Set-Cookie(puter_revalidation, token, maxAge=300s) + 302 redirect
OIDCRouter → Browser: HTML page with inline script
onMessage validates ev.origin === gui_origin or window.location.origin
openRevalidatePopup: setInterval(300ms) polls popup.closed → rejects TeePromise if closed early
error_flows: Missing code or state → MISSING_CODE_OR_STATE → buildOIDCErrorRedirectUrl
buildOIDCErrorRedirectUrl: if stateDecoded.embedded_in_popup && msg_id → popup-aware redirect with embedded_in_popup=true,msg_id,auth_error=1
OIDC_ERROR_REDIRECT_MAP: login+account_not_found→signup, signup+account_already_exists→login, otherwise same flow

key_functions.processOIDCCallbackRequest_(req, callbac: Validates code+state, verifies JWT state, exchanges code for tokens, fetches userinfo. Returns {provider, userinfo, stateDecoded} or {error: Symbol}
key_functions.buildOIDCErrorRedirectUrl(sourceFlow, er: Constructs error redirect URL using OIDC_ERROR_REDIRECT_MAP; popup-aware via stateDecoded.embedded_in_popup+msg_id
key_functions.finishOidcSuccess_(req, res, user, state: Creates session via AuthService.create_session_token(), resolves redirect target from stateDecoded.redirect_uri
key_functions.openRevalidatePopup(revalidateUrl): Opens popup window, listens for postMessage('puter-revalidate-done'), returns TeePromise
key_functions.OIDCService.verifyState(token): JWT verify; returns null on error
key_functions.OIDCService.exchangeCodeForTokens(provid: POST to token_endpoint with code+client credentials
key_functions.AuthService.create_session_token(user, m: Creates DB session + signs JWT via TokenService

key_relationships: OIDCService calls IdentityProvider (external HTTP: token_endpoint, userinfo_endpoint)
GUI openid.js uses TeePromise for async popup coordination
revalidate-done page communicates with opener via postMessage
important_notes: 3 callback flows: login (create-or-login), signup (signup-or-login), revalidate (identity re-verify, 5min cookie). State JWT carries provider + redirect_uri + optional popup params. Cookie name from config.cookie_name (SameSite=none, Secure, HttpOnly). Revalidation cookie: 'puter_revalidation', 300s expiry. Popup flow: msg_id in state enables post-message-based OIDC completion without page nav. Rate limiting via 'oidc-general' key on all start+callback endpoints.
